creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 213431
Linux crash, Waterfox Classic, Talky

This crash occurred with a Manjaro Linux guest and (slightly outdated) Waterfox Classic 2020.03.1 whilst attempting to use the integrated webcam, and audio input (without the SteelSeries headset), for Talky chat i.e. 

<https://talky.io/>

Side note: the thought of Waterfox Classic arose from <https://github.com/MrAlex94/Waterfox/issues/1513>, which I might resolve as invalid when (eventually) I can test on a physical machine running Windows 10.
